name: Trace2Skill: 轨迹局部经验→可移植Agent Skill的并行合并蒸馏
content: 三阶段：①frozen agent滚出labeled轨迹 ②parallel error/success analysts提出trajectory-level patch ③hierarchical merge所有patch成一个portable skill directory | 跨模型迁移 +57.65pp on WikiTableQuestions (Qwen3.5-35B→Qwen3.5-122B); 跨家族(Gemma-4-31B→Qwen3.5-122B); OOD迁移(Spreadsheet→table QA); Anthropic官方xlsx/PDF/DOCX/PPTX技能深度增强 | patch value is often combinatorial → holistic consolidation > greedy local selection; 一个consolidated skill > ReasoningBank-style episodic retrieval
summary: 记忆系统·程序性记忆(外化) — 完美对齐盘古点名种子 'PMD程序性记忆蒸馏' 的外化维度
key_insights: 三阶段：①frozen agent滚出labeled轨迹 ②parallel error/success analysts提出trajectory-level patch ③hierarchical merge所有patch成一个portable skill directory
跨模型迁移 +57.65pp on WikiTableQuestions (Qwen3.5-35B→Qwen3.5-122B); 跨家族(Gemma-4-31B→Qwen3.5-122B); OOD迁移(Spreadsheet→table QA); Anthropic官方xlsx/PDF/DOCX/PPTX技能深度增强
patch value is often combinatorial → holistic consolidation > greedy local selection; 一个consolidated skill > ReasoningBank-style episodic retrieval
xihe_relevance: 曦和Skill自审+evolution_engine的'Skill生命周期'目前缺'可跨模型/跨域迁移'机制。memory_writer.extract_procedural_pattern已落PMD,可加 trace2skill_consolidate 把多个patch hierarchical merge成一个标准Skill.md | 融合落点: A. 嫁接 → memory_writer.trace2skill_consolidate (与PMD的extract_procedural_pattern拼成完整程序性记忆)
